entities.name: sotorasib
entities.context: Two of these molecules, sotorasib and adagrasib, are approved for the treatment of adult patients with KRASG12C-mutated previously treated advanced non-small cell lung cancer.

entities.name: RMC-4998
entities.context: the preclinical tool tri-complex KRASG12C-selective covalent inhibitor, RMC-4998 (also known as RM-029), that targets the active GTP-bound (ON) state of the oncogene

entities.name: RMC-6291
entities.context: the clinical stage KRASG12C(ON) inhibitor RMC-6291 alone or in combination with KRASG12C(OFF) drugs

entities.name: KRAS
entities.context: Selective KRASG12C inhibitors have been developed to covalently lock the oncogene in the inactive GDP-bound state.

entities.name: acquired KRAS mutations (cis and trans)
entities.context: Mass sequencing from patients biopsies identified a number of acquired KRAS mutations -both in cis and in trans- in resistant tumors.

entities.name: drug resistance to KRAS G12C inhibitors
